title: Bread Ahead Jam Filling
method: Stir all ingredients together in a saucepan over medium heat
Once sugar has dissolved, bring to a boil, then simmer for 5 mins until thickened
To test whether or not jam has reached setting point, take a teaspoon of jam and place it on a cold plate.
Allow to cool, then run your finger through and if it doesn't run back we have reached setting point
Alternatively once the jam is boiling, use thermometer to check temperature. Setting point achieved at 105C
Take pan off heat and leave for 10 minutes, then whisk the foam on the top back into the jam and pour into warm, sterilised jars
notes: Recipe comes from the bread ahead doughnut workshop
Use as a jam filling for bread ahead doughnuts
If making jam without pectin, grate half an apple with the skin on. Add this to saucepan instead of pectin in first step
